channel.title: Daily Podcast Briefing
channel.description: Your personal daily podcast briefing. Key takeaways, insights, and actionable items from the best podcast episodes, ranked by relevance.
channel.itunes:author: Lorenzo

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-06-01
item.description: Covering 2 episodes: The Diary Of A CEO: Tech Whistleblower: You Only Have 3 Years Left Before This Hits! - Mo Gawdat (8/10) The Peter Attia Drive: #394 ‒ Sleep pharmacology: the role of medications in healthy sleep, the promise of emerging therapies, and the evidence for common sleep supplements (8/10)

item.title: Daily Briefing — 2026-03-25
item.description: Covering 6 episodes: HBR Ideacast: Learn to Disagree More Effectively (8/10) The Diary Of A CEO: David Sinclair: Can Aging Be Reversed? After 8 Weeks, Cells Appeared 75% Younger In Tests! (9/10) Refactoring Podcast: What Comes After the IDE 🖥 — with Amelia Wattenberger (9/10) The knowledge project: [Outliers] Harrison McCain: How to Create Demand for Something Nobody Wants (8/10) Manager Tools: Top Ten Hiring Mistakes - #7 - Being Swayed (9/10) The Peter Attia Drive: #385 - AMA #82: Applying the tools of longevity in the real world: disease prevention, DEXA scans, artificial sweeteners, injury recovery, stability training, habit formation, protein intake and mTOR activation, and more (9/10)
